title: Crispy Peruvian Peanuts Suspiro Limeno
description: A nutty, smoky snack with a sweet lime glaze, perfect for meal-prep and packed with anti-inflammatory flavors.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 F (177 C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Spread the raw peanuts in a single layer on the sheet and roast for 10 minutes, stirring once.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, honey, lime juice, lime zest, smoked paprika, turmeric, ginger, minced garlic, and sea salt until smooth.
Remove peanuts from oven and pour the glaze over them, tossing to coat evenly.
Return the coated peanuts to the oven and roast for another 10 minutes until they are crisp and fragrant.
Transfer the peanuts to a cooling rack and let them cool completely; the glaze will set into a sticky, caramelized coating.
Portion the cooled peanuts into airtight containers for up to 4 days of snackable, anti-inflammatory goodness.
